generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance TemperatureActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC temperature actuator embedded in Building Control System (BCS) enabling bidirectional control interactions between Digital Twin and physical infrastructure for adaptive environmental regulation."
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy-based lighting actuator integrated with BCS for dynamic illumination control based on virtualized operational decisions from the Digital Twin."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Programmable Logic Controller (PLC) managing HVAC systems with real-time adjustments enabled through Digital Twin's control logic execution."
]

instance BCSConfigurationModel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "BCS configuration model acting as an interface between Digital Twin's control logic and physical actuators for system-wide operational coordination."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy temperature sensor deployed within building environment collecting real-time environmental data for Digital Twin monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy humidity sensor providing real-time moisture level data for building environmental condition analysis in Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor detecting presence patterns within building spaces for space utilization analysis and adaptive control recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light sensor measuring illumination levels for daylight harvesting optimization and lighting control adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMonitoringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building energy consumption sensor tracking real-time electrical usage patterns for predictive energy management."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitoringSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric, spatial, and functional BIM representation of building components serving as foundational digital representation for Digital Twin deployment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToolEnabler
]

instance EnergyPerformanceSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Energy performance simulation model integrated with Digital Twin for predictive energy consumption analysis and optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler
]

instance OccupantBehaviorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Occupant behavior simulation model providing virtualized user patterns for space utilization optimization in Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AI/ML-based control logic model enabling adaptive building system operations through real-time decision making in Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AIMLEnabler
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from building sensors transmitted to Digital Twin for environmental monitoring and control."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity measurements collected from building sensors for indoor air quality analysis in Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AnalyticsEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy patterns and presence data collected from building sensors for space utilization optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlEnabler
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient light level measurements used for daylight harvesting optimization and lighting control adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time building energy consumption data for predictive analytics and efficiency optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimizationEnabler
]

instance ControlSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by Digital Twin for execution on physical actuators through BCS integration."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControlSignalTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BCSIntegrationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD) enabling automated extraction of building semantics and device configurations for Digital Twin deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMToDTService
]

instance SimulationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation middleware enabling energy performance and occupant behavior simulations within Digital Twin framework."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance AIMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AI/ML processing engine enabling adaptive control logic and predictive analytics within Digital Twin operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine-based visualization platform providing immersive 3D monitoring and interactive Digital Twin environments."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance AnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics engine processing building operational data for optimization recommendations in Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables AnalyticsService
]

instance ControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Control System integration middleware enabling bidirectional communication between Digital Twin and physical actuators."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance BCSIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto middleware facilitating standardized data exchange between Digital Twin control logic and physical BCS components."
    DTDFVocab:enables BCSIntegrationService
]

instance DataExchangeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware enabling real-time data transmission from physical sensors to Digital Twin runtime artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataExchangeService
]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lifecycle optimization engine providing energy efficiency and operational performance recommendations through Digital Twin analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance BIMToDTService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated BIM-to-Digital-Twin deployment service extracting building semantics and generating runtime artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMDeploymentInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy performance and occupant behavior simulation service providing predictive modeling capabilities within Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "AI-driven adaptive control service enabling real-time building system optimization through Digital Twin decision making."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlRecommendationAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization service providing interactive monitoring of building conditions through Digital Twin interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance AnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service generating optimization recommendations based on building operational data in Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationRecommendationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building control service executing Digital Twin decisions on physical actuators through BCS integration."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlExecutionAction
]

instance BCSIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "BCS integration service enabling bidirectional communication between Digital Twin control logic and physical building systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemCoordinationInsight
]

instance DataExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange service transmitting sensor data from physical environment to Digital Twin runtime."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataSynchronizationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Lifecycle optimization service providing energy efficiency and operational performance recommendations through Digital Twin analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyRecommendationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BIMDeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of successful BIM-to-Digital-Twin deployment including semantic alignment and runtime artifact generation."
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted energy performance and occupant behavior patterns generated by Digital Twin simulations for operational planning."
]

instance ControlRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control adjustments (e.g., HVAC setpoints, lighting levels) based on Digital Twin's adaptive control logic."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building conditions and Digital Twin operational status for stakeholder monitoring."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven optimization suggestions for building operations including energy efficiency improvements and space utilization optimization."
]

instance ControlExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of Digital Twin control decisions on physical actuators through BCS integration for real-time building management."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemCoordinationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of successful coordination between Digital Twin control logic and physical building systems through BCS interface."
]

instance DataSynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of real-time data synchronization between physical sensors and Digital Twin runtime artifacts."
]

instance EfficiencyRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Lifecycle optimization recommendations for building operations including energy efficiency improvements and maintenance planning."
]

// C18: Environment
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, EnergyMonitoringSensor,
                 TemperatureActuator, LightingActuator, HVACController, BCSConfigurationModel
]

instance DigitalTwinRuntime : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BIMModel, EnergyPerformanceSimulationModel, OccupantBehaviorSimulationModel,
                 ControlLogicModel, TemperatureData, HumidityData, OccupancyData, LightData, EnergyData,
                 ControlSignalData
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BCSConfigurationModel, TemperatureActuator, LightingActuator, HVACController
]

// Fixed ControlSignalTransmitted instance
instance ControlSignalTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSConfigurationModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates **control signals, commands, or adjustments** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints, occupancy-based controls) and transmits them back to physical actuators and controllers via **bidirectional communication protocols**. This enables real-time operational adjustments and automation based on DT-driven insights."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, with **low-latency synchronization** between the physical and virtual systems. The framework ensures **continuous data exchange** to maintain coherence, though specific technical details (e.g., millisecond intervals) are not explicitly quantified in the documents. The emphasis is on **live operational data integration** to support immediate decision-making and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular platform** with the following components:
  - **BIM backbone** (semantic foundation for device modeling and control logic).
  - **Middleware layer** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange).
  - **Visualization layer** (Unreal Engine for interactive 3D environments).
  - **Service layer** (customizable services for analytics, optimization, and control).
  The framework enables **bidirectional communication** between the PT and DT, with clear roles for stakeholders (e.g., Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, DT Engineers)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the **entire building life cycle**, spanning:
   - **Design phase**: Integration of BIM models for initial asset representation.
   - **Construction phase**: Validation and configuration of physical devices (e.g., sensors, actuators).
   - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, control, and optimization of building performance.
   The framework bridges the gap between **static BIM representations** (design/construction) and **dynamic operational requirements** (as-operated), ensuring continuity across all phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** for measuring alignment between PT and DT.
  - **Verification and validation** of BIM models and runtime artifacts.
  - **Uncertainty quantification** (e.g., sensor accuracy, model drift) to address semantic drift and data inconsistencies.
  - **Quality assurance** mechanisms for ensuring data integrity and operational coherence."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **standardized middleware integration** (Eclipse Hono and Ditto) for real-time data exchange. The framework does not specify low-level protocols (e.g., MQTT, OPC UA) but emphasizes **bidirectional communication** between the DT and Building Control Systems (BCS). The middleware abstracts these details, ensuring **interoperability** with heterogeneous IoT devices and sensors."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is deployed using a **modular architecture** with **scalable, service-oriented components**. The framework supports **low-overhead updates** and **extensible service integration**, though specific deployment strategies (e.g., containerized or distributed) are not detailed. The **Unreal Engine** and **Eclipse Ditto/Hono** are central to the deployment infrastructure, enabling **real-time visualization and data processing**."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates horizontally with **heterogeneous infrastructure systems** in the AECO domain, including:
   - **Building Automation Systems (BAS)**: For real-time control and monitoring.
   - **Energy Management Systems (EMS)**: To optimize energy consumption and operational efficiency.
   The framework ensures **interoperability** through standardized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and **modular service architectures**, enabling seamless data exchange with external systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards** and **model-driven engineering (MDE) principles** for semantic consistency. While it does not explicitly reference standards like IFC, COBie, or protocols (e.g., MQTT, OPC UA), it emphasizes **standardized integration frameworks** and **BIM compatibility** to ensure interoperability across tools and platforms."
]
